rounds: Two weeks of going through the motions in the same safe work outfit — the Joy Police held that ground pretty comfortably. Then the Apollo ring moment: colleague noticed, asked, and you shut the door before it could open. That one stings a little because you were *wearing* the half-naked man. You invited the conversation just by existing.
pattern: They're letting you wear the things but not letting you own them.
focus: One stranger gets a real answer this week — even just 'it's Apollo, I think he's beautiful.'
